chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4699 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.20844/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Shar, advocate for the petitioner. Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent No.5. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent. It is jointly submitted that petition is squarely covered by Division Bench judgment passed in the case of Premier Systems (Pvt.) Ltd. v. Federation of Pakistan & Others, reported as 2018 PTD 861, hence, may be disposed of in the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
